name: 6' Cedar with Poinsettia Flowers and Pinecones Christmas Artificial Garland - Wondershop™: Traditional Decor, Indoor/Sheltered Outdoor Use
description:
Welcome the holiday season by decorating your home with this 6-Foot Cedar with Poinsettia Flowers and Pinecones Christmas Garland from Wondershop™. This artificial decorative garland features faux mixed greenery tips decorated with red poinsettia flowers and pinecones for a festive look. Suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor spaces, this unlit Christmas garland can be placed over a door, above the fireplace mantel or around a banister.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
